name: http-request
description: Make an HTTP request to any URL. Supports GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE with custom headers and JSON body.

inputs.name: url
inputs.description: The URL to send the request to

inputs.name: method
inputs.description: HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE)

inputs.name: headers
inputs.description: Custom headers as a JSON object

outputs.name: body
outputs.description: Parsed response body (JSON if possible, otherwise text)
